description: Perform a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on the 25 Big Five personality items (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) in the 'BFI25.csv' dataset to extract 5 components using Varimax rotation. Save the component scores as new variables and identify which component represents Neuroticism based on the loadings of items N1-N5. Determine the Pearson correlation between Age and this Neuroticism component. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/PCA_Workflow.omv and record the absolute value of the correlation coefficient in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/neuroticism_age_corr.txt.
